CREATE TABLE test_files (id INT, filename VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_files (id, filename, created_at) VALUES (1, 'file1.txt', NOW());
INSERT INTO test_files (id, filename, created_at) VALUES (2, 'file2.txt', NOW());
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE filename = 'file2.txt' AND id = (SELECT id FROM test_files WHERE filename = 'file2.txt');
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE exists (SELECT 1 FROM test_files WHERE filename = 'file1.txt' AND id = test_files.id);
DELETE FROM test_files WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_files WHERE filename LIKE 'file%');
SELECT sys_unlink(filename) FROM test_files WHERE id = 2;
SELECT sys_unlink(filename) FROM test_files WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_files);
SELECT sys_unlink(filename) FROM test_files t JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_files WHERE id < 3) sub ON t.id = sub.id;
SELECT sys_unlink(filename) FROM (SELECT filename FROM test_files WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day') AS subquery WHERE id = 1;
